b_cohort_leakage_oasis_vs_adni_raw.interpretation: HIGH -> OASIS and ADNI are separable from the raw embedding (scanner/site batch); pool only after harmonization.

c_harmonized.method: ComBat (neuroad.data.harmonize) batch=cohort, covariates=(age,sex), dx-blind; AUCs via probe.auc_ci_perm leakage-free CV with auto PCA-10.

ptau217_high_vs_low.interpretation: embedding predicts plasma p-tau217 high-vs-low -> the frozen MRI representation carries tau-pathology signal.

amyloid_status.interpretation: embedding predicts amyloid status -> structural MRI anchors to the amyloid molecular gate.

pass_criteria: (a) within-ADNI AD-vs-CN CI excludes 0.5; (b/c) cohort-leakage drops toward ~0.5 after ComBat while pooled AD-vs-CN survives -> honest pooling; (d) p-tau217/amyloid AUC CI excludes 0.5 -> the MRI embedding anchors to plasma/amyloid pathology.
compliance: Frozen inference only; weights never stored; embedding tables git-ignored.
verdict: within-ADNI AD-vs-CN separates; PASS pooling; p-tau217 anchored; amyloid anchored
